title: Teddy Roosevelt's Heroic Honor
story: Bully! A century after his daring charge up San Juan Hill, Theodore Roosevelt received a special salute. title: A Promise of Land for the Freed
story: General Sherman made a bold move to help newly freed Black families. On January 16, 1865, he issued Field Order #15. This order took land from Southern owners and gave it to freed slaves in forty-acre plots. It was a way to give former slaves a fresh start and a chance to build their own lives after years of hardship.
